case_title: MAINTENANCE SYSTEM MGMT. VS WEST BERKELEY HEALTH CTR.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MAINTENANCE SYSTEM MGMT. AS TO DEFENDANT WEST BERKELEY HEALTH CTR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAINTENANCE SYSTEM MGMT. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST BERKELEY HEALTH CTR. $4,225.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,245.00, BAL OF $225.00 DUE ON 3/15/94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. LETTER TO WEST BERKELEY HEALTH CTR. RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
CERT. RECEIPT TO PEGGY WOODRUFF RETURNED SIGNED.
